_meta.description: D6 fixtures for hermes / open-gen-ui + open-gen-ui-advanced. The demos route to /api/copilotkit-ogui (a dedicated hermes runtime with `openGenerativeUI: { agents: [...] }`), so the frontend auto-registers a `generateSandboxedUi` tool, the agent EMITS it (driven by these fixtures), and the runtime OpenGenerativeUIMiddleware converts the streamed tool call into open-generative-ui activity events that the built-in OpenGenerativeUIActivityRenderer mounts inside a sandboxed iframe. Basic pills render iframe[srcdoc] (D5 probe: '3D axis visualization (model airplane)'); advanced pills render iframe[sandbox*=allow-scripts] whose jsFunctions call host sandboxFunctions via Websandbox (D5 probe: 'Inline expression evaluator'). Sandboxed-UI jsFunctions copied verbatim from langgraph-python so the calculator keypad += , inline-eval, and host-ping bridge round-trips wire identically. Tool-emitting fixtures are gated on `hasToolResult:false` so the follow-up content leg (gated on toolCallId) fires on iteration 2.

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui — 3D axis visualization pill (also the D5 gen-ui-open probe prompt). The agent calls generateSandboxedUi which renders an iframe[srcdoc] with a non-trivial HTML payload (>= 100 chars).

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":400,"placeholderMessages":["Rendering 3D axis visualization…"],"css":"body{margin:0;background:#0f172a;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh;font-family:system-ui}canvas{border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}#info{position:absolute;top:12px;left:12px;color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px}","html":"
3D Axis — Model Airplane
","jsFunctions":"(function(){var c=document.getElementById('c');var ctx=c.getContext('2d');var cx=200,cy=150;function draw(t){ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,300);ctx.strokeStyle='#ef4444';ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(cx,cy);ctx.lineTo(cx+Math.cos(t)*80,cy-Math.sin(t)*40);ctx.stroke();ctx.strokeStyle='#22c55e';ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(cx,cy);ctx.lineTo(cx,cy-80);ctx.stroke();ctx.strokeStyle='#3b82f6';ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(cx,cy);ctx.lineTo(cx-Math.sin(t)*60,cy-Math.cos(t)*30);ctx.stroke();ctx.fillStyle='#e2e8f0';ctx.font='10px system-ui';ctx.fillText('X',cx+Math.cos(t)*85,cy-Math.sin(t)*40);ctx.fillText('Y',cx-6,cy-85);ctx.fillText('Z',cx-Math.sin(t)*65,cy-Math.cos(t)*30);requestAnimationFrame(function(){draw(t+0.01);});}draw(0);})();"}

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui — follow-up content after generateSandboxedUi returns.

response.content: 3D axis visualization rendered above — the canvas shows rotating X (red), Y (green), and Z (blue) axes representing the model airplane's orientation.

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui — 'How a neural network works' e2e pill.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":480,"placeholderMessages":["Sketching the network…","Labelling layers…","Animating the forward pass…"],"css":"body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui;background:#ffffff;color:#0f172a}.card{padding:20px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px;margin:16px}.t{font-size:16px;font-weight:600}.s{font-size:12px;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:8px}circle{transition:fill .4s}line{stroke:#64748b;stroke-width:1}.pulse{animation:p 1.2s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes p{0%,100%{opacity:.3}50%{opacity:1}}","html":"
How a neural network works
Activations flow left to right through the layers.
"}

response.content: Neural-network diagram rendered above — the input nodes (indigo) feed the hidden node (emerald), which feeds the output (amber), pulsing to show the forward pass.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":460,"placeholderMessages":["Laying out the array…","Choosing a pivot…","Animating partitions…"],"css":"body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui;background:#ffffff;color:#0f172a}.card{padding:20px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px;margin:16px}.t{font-size:16px;font-weight:600}.s{font-size:12px;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:12px}.bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:6px;height:180px}.bar{flex:1;background:#6366f1;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;animation:g 1.6s ease-in-out infinite alternate}.pivot{background:#f59e0b}@keyframes g{from{opacity:.6}to{opacity:1}}","html":"
Quicksort visualization
The amber bar is the pivot; blue bars partition around it.
"}

response.content: Quicksort visualization rendered above — the amber pivot partitions the blue bars into smaller and larger halves.

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui — 'Fourier: square wave from sines' e2e pill.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":460,"placeholderMessages":["Drawing the axes…","Summing sine harmonics…","Animating convergence…"],"css":"body{margin:0;background:#0f172a;font-family:system-ui}canvas{display:block;margin:16px auto;border-radius:8px;background:#1e293b}#t{color:#e2e8f0;font-size:14px;padding:12px 16px 0}","html":"
Fourier: square wave from sines
","jsFunctions":"(function(){var c=document.getElementById('c');var ctx=c.getContext('2d');function draw(ph){ctx.clearRect(0,0,420,280);ctx.strokeStyle='#6366f1';ctx.beginPath();for(var x=0;x<420;x++){var y=140;for(var k=1;k<=9;k+=2){y-=(70/k)*Math.sin((k*(x/40))+ph);}if(x===0)ctx.moveTo(x,y);else ctx.lineTo(x,y);}ctx.stroke();requestAnimationFrame(function(){draw(ph+0.03);});}draw(0);})();"}

response.content: Fourier visualization rendered above — the animated curve sums odd sine harmonics to approximate a square wave.

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui-advanced — 'Inline expression evaluator' pill (also the D5 gen-ui-open-advanced probe prompt). generateSandboxedUi whose jsFunctions calls the host evaluateExpression sandbox function via Websandbox.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":320,"placeholderMessages":["Composing expression evaluator…"],"css":"body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0}.card{padding:16px;background:#1e293b;border-radius:12px;margin:16px}input{width:100%;padding:8px;background:#0f172a;border:1px solid #334155;color:#e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;box-sizing:border-box}button{margin-top:8px;padding:8px 16px;background:#6366f1;border:0;color:#fff;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer}.out{margin-top:8px;font-size:12px;color:#94a3b8}","html":"

Inline expression evaluator

awaiting input…
","jsFunctions":"(function(){var input=document.getElementById('in');var out=document.getElementById('out');var go=document.getElementById('go');async function run(){var expr=input.value;out.textContent='evaluating…';var res=await Websandbox.connection.remote.evaluateExpression({expression:expr});out.textContent=res&&res.ok?'= '+res.value:'error: '+res.error;}go.addEventListener('click',run);input.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Enter')run();});})();"}

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui-advanced — follow-up content after generateSandboxedUi returns.

response.content: Expression evaluator rendered — type any math expression and it evaluates in real time via the sandbox bridge.

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui-advanced: Calculator pill — generateSandboxedUi with jsFunctions wiring for the evaluateExpression host callback.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":480,"placeholderMessages":["Composing calculator UI…"],"css":"body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0}.wrap{padding:16px;max-width:240px}.display{background:#1e293b;padding:8px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;font-family:monospace;text-align:right}.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:6px}button{padding:10px;background:#334155;border:0;color:#e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;font-size:14px}","html":"
0
","jsFunctions":"(function(){var expr='';var display=document.getElementById('d');document.querySelectorAll('.grid button').forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener('click',async function(){if(btn.id==='eq'){var res=await Websandbox.connection.remote.evaluateExpression({expression:expr});if(res&&res.ok){display.textContent=String(res.value);expr=String(res.value);}else{display.textContent='err';expr='';}}else{expr+=btn.textContent;display.textContent=expr;}});});})();"}

fixtures._comment: open-gen-ui-advanced: Ping the host pill — generateSandboxedUi with the notifyHost callback.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":320,"placeholderMessages":["Composing host-ping card…"],"css":"body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0}.card{padding:24px;background:#1e293b;border-radius:12px;margin:16px;text-align:center}button{padding:10px 20px;background:#6366f1;border:0;color:#fff;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer}.out{margin-top:12px;font-size:12px;color:#94a3b8}","html":"

Notify the host

awaiting click…
","jsFunctions":"document.getElementById('hi').addEventListener('click',async function(){var out=document.getElementById('out');out.textContent='sending…';var res=await Websandbox.connection.remote.notifyHost({message:'Hello from sandbox'});out.textContent=res&&res.ok?'host replied at '+res.receivedAt:'failed';});"}
